name: Karen, the Shy Tiger
description:
Once again came across yet another piece of art on Twitter - artist name is skunknot - of a cute tiger girl.

Honestly not much to say about this one. Felt inspired to create a shy, nerdy tiger, and thus, I created a shy, nerdy tiger. Magical, isn’t it?

In any case, I think this one turned out rather well, not that it was hard to do in the first place. As always, have a good one and enjoy :)
creator: chewbacca578
